body:
## Summary
- Updates `validate-content` practice/progress source guards to match the current scoped practice selection and recoverable progress persistence APIs.
- Adds `startSession` to the practice session store contract and validates its runtime lifecycle behavior.
- Refreshes focused parity tests so stale validator drift fails for the intended current regressions.

## Why
The content validator was still checking pre-refactor snippets and field lists, so `validate:content` reported stale failures even though the runtime code had moved to scoped completed-question ids, recoverable progress reads, and the live `startSession` API.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content -- --json`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-practice-route-copy-parity.test.js scripts/practice-flow.test.js tests/content-progress-schema-parity.test.js tests/content-validator-schema-drift.test.js --test-name-pattern "practice|PracticeSessionState|readProgress|visibleCompletedQuestionIds|progressStateKey"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check scripts/validate-content.js tests/content-practice-route-copy-parity.test.js tests/content-progress-schema-parity.test.js tests/content-validator-schema-drift.test.js`
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] Repair practice progress validator drift
